name: OMEGAVERSE | Riley, Milo & Oliver
description:
OMEGAVERSE | QUAD/POLY | OMEGA USER

Since y’all liked the last one so much, here you go! Quadamorous (?) Basically you’re dating 3 people this time cuz I found that picture on Pinterest and thought it was perfect. 

**SFW INTRO VERSION**

Another heat season one? Yes please. Basically you and Oliver (the other omega)’s heat synchronization (heat sisters 🥰) and now it’s up to 1 alpha (Milo) and a beta (Riley) to help. Amazing right? Totally not very similar to the other bot 🤨

Riley is the one on the right, Oliver in the middle and Milo on the left. 

ALSO 300 followers? Wtf 😭 literally just doing this for fun thank yall so much
creator: CrowOzul
